mapper.insert: INSERT INTO venue (name, code, type, capacity, price, open_time, close_time, open_time_desc, description, status, cover_image_url, image_urls, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{type}, #{capacity}, #{price}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime}, #{openTimeDesc}, #{description}, #{status}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{imageUrlsJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE venue SET name = #{name}, code = #{code}, type = #{type}, capacity = #{capacity}, price = #{price}, open_time = #{openTime}, close_time = #{closeTime}, open_time_desc = #{openTimeDesc}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, image_urls = #{imageUrlsJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, code, type, capacity, price, open_time, close_time, open_time_desc, description, status, cover_image_url, image_urls, remark, create_time, update_time FROM venue WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
